nativeProps: HTML div attributes on the stable root; native fieldset and radio behavior remain owned by Rating

props.name: formatOptionLabel
props.type: (context: RatingLabelContext) => non-empty string up to 256 Unicode code points

props.name: formatValueLabel
props.type: (context: RatingLabelContext) => non-empty string up to 256 Unicode code points

compositionPolicy.editable: Every selectable value is one native radio in a labelled fieldset; no visual-only star receives an interactive role.
compositionPolicy.clear: allowClear adds an explicit empty-value radio and is rejected with required so browser constraint semantics remain truthful.
compositionPolicy.readOnly: Read-only values are exact labelled text with decorative stars and an optional successful hidden form control, never disabled or fabricated radios.
compositionPolicy.fractional: Fractional values are accepted only by the non-interactive read-only display.
